name: Ryder System, Inc.
description: Ryder System, Inc. is a leading third-party logistics provider that offers technology-driven supply chain, dedicated transportation, and fleet management solutions. Serving a diverse range of industries, the company provides comprehensive services including warehouse management, e-commerce fulfillment, last-mile delivery, freight brokerage, and commercial truck leasing and maintenance. With over 90 years of experience, Ryder operates an extensive infrastructure across North America, managing a massive fleet of commercial vehicles and millions of square feet of warehouse space to help businesses of all sizes optimize their supply chain operations and improve overall efficiency.
